memoryArtifacts.headline: John Watts by Myrtle S. Hyde
memoryArtifacts.description: John Watts was born about 1450, probably in Worstead, Norfolk, England. He was of Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, when his will was prepared April 4, 1500. Probate was March 6, 1500/01.  In the …

zh.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Watts於大約1450年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可沃斯亞德時，他的父親Thomas Wattys19歲，母親Lady Alice de Beby11歲。他和Beatrix至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1501年3月6日之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Watts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Watt , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Watt
meanings: Scottish and English: from the common Middle English personal name, Wat(t), a short form of Walter .
West African (Senegal and Mauritania): Tukulor name of unexplained etymology.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 屈, possibly based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Qu   3.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Watts was born about 1450, in Worstead, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Wattys, was 19 and his mother, Lady Alice de Beby, was 11. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Beatrix. He died before 6 March 1501, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Beatrix. Il est décédé avant 6 mars 1501, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Beatrix mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 6. März 1501 in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Beatrix. Morì prima del 6 marzo 1501, nel Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wattsが約1450年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウオルステアドで生まれた時，父Thomas Wattysは19歳，母Lady Alice de Bebyは11歳であった。彼はBeatrixとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1501年3月6日以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで死去した。

ko.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: John Watts(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 워스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wattys(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Beby(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Beatrix(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 3월 6일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Watts родился около 1450 г. в местности ворстид, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Wattys было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Beby, 11. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Beatrix. Он умер перед 6 марта 1501 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
